transcript.content: 这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
我已经把这个问题修到根上了。 根因不是 node 路径了，而是状态栏刷新走了完整 GC 判定链路，导致扩展里看起来像“点击没反应 / 刷新失败”。现在我把状态栏和详情窗口改成了 `host-only fast path`：
为什么 codex插件里是 486k，你给的是258k？
因为我这里的监控脚本把窗口上限 `主动 clamp 到了 258k`，而 Codex 插件显示的是它自己上报的 `reported model_context_window`，大约 `486k`。 代码里就是这么写的：

decision.archive_summary: Earlier subtopics about click latency and the meaning/labeling of `Ctx: error` were addressed. The current active thread is the Codex VS Code context-size discrepancy: the plugin shows about 486k from its reported `model_context_window`, while the assistant-side monitor clamps to about 258k; the user then asked to proceed with a fix or follow-up on that discrepancy.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn continues the same active topic rather than switching topics. For the next turn, the raw prompt mainly needs the recent discrepancy discussion (`t8`-`t11`). The earlier click-behavior and generic `Ctx: error` explanation blocks look resolved and are good eviction candidates. No semantic pins are necessary from the older raw turns because they are not durable user preferences or unresolved obligations independent of the current active topic.

The current active thread is the Codex VS Code context-size discrepancy: the plugin shows about 486k from its reported `model_context_window`, while the assistant-side monitor clamps to about 258k; the user then asked to proceed with a fix or follow-up on that discrepancy.
applied.reasoningSummary: The latest user turn continues the same active topic rather than switching topics.
